narrative:
Warwick Township has 1,744 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.8 percentage points.
